nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (NAG-Neg Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

nodes.title: lora
widgets_values:
14B speedup lora doesn't support 1.3B main model

merge_loras off:
Same result for using WanVideo Set LoRAs Node or linking directly to lora slot of WanVideo Model Loder.

merge_loras on:
is only for linking directly to the lora slot of the WanVideo Model Loader and achieves a different (maybe better) result from merge_loras off.

Tune lora and lora str:
Use WanVideo Set LoRAs Node and turn off merge_loras without loading main model repeatly.

Fixed lora and test merge_loras on:
link directly to lora slot of WanVideo Model Loder and turn on merge_loras.

choose sparse sage attention:
select sageatten in the Model Loder and bypass the Set Radial Attention.
choose radial sage attention:
select radial_sage_attention in the Model Loder and select sageatten in the Set Radial Attention.

The speed of Radial SageAttn is faster than the Sparse SageAttn.

nodes.title: Triton
widgets_values:
Wan Video Torch Compile Settings is disconnected by default and will not take effect if you're using fp8 e4m3 diffusion model and your graphic card is 20xx or 30xx.

If you choose fp32/bf16/fp16/fp8 e5m2 model, then you can:
1. Link Wan Video Torch Compile Settings to the Wan Video Model Loader to speed up about 15%~25%..
2. Follow the VRAM settings instruction in the Wan Video Wrapper Tips Group.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (NAG-Neg Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

(default) bypass Torch Compile Mode Wan Video if you're using fp8_em43 diffusion model and your graphic card is 20xx or 30xx.

If you choose fp32/bf16/fp16/fp8 e5m2 model, then you can change weight_dtype to default and link Torch Compile Mode Wan Video to the workflow to speed up about 15%~25%.

Bypass KJ TeaCache and SLG nodes when using speed up lora.

nodes.type: CR Apply LoRA Stack Model Only JK

properties.Node name for S&R: CR Apply LoRA Stack Model Only JK

widgets_values: model_high_noise slot: High noise model with or without lowstep lora, both work. High noise model with lowstep lora might be better.

nodes.type: CR Apply LoRA Stack Model Only JK

properties.Node name for S&R: CR Apply LoRA Stack Model Only JK

widgets_values:
1. Switch_at_Step = end_step splt in the graph

2. Link Basic Scheduler for Native Switch at Step. Note sigmas are approximate values.

3. You can link WanVideo Sigma To Step to end_step of 1st pass and start_step of 2nd pass Wrapper Sampler directly and do not need to caculate the switch_at_step value.

4. Native Sigmas supports denoise <1.0. Wrapper denoise uses different approach.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
[global caption] The scene features a lone character: [character1], a young woman with windswept auburn hair, wearing a heavy, warm coat. The environment is a dramatic, rocky cliffside overlooking a turbulent ocean at sunrise. The sky is filled with hues of orange, pink, and purple. 
This scene contains 5 shots. 
[per shot caption] Wide shot of the majestic sunrise over the ocean, with [character1] as a small silhouette standing on the edge of the cliff, emphasizing the grandeur of nature. 
[shot cut] Medium shot of [character1] from the side as she looks out at the horizon, the wind gently blowing her hair. 
[shot cut] Close-up of [character1]'s face, her eyes filled with awe and a hint of melancholy, the warm light of the sunrise illuminating her features. 
[shot cut] Close-up of her hand gripping a small, weathered stone. 
[shot cut] Medium shot of [character1] turning her head slightly and closing her eyes, taking a deep breath of the sea air.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values:
find more multi-shot prompts on [Holo Cine](https://holo-cine.github.io/)  
  
Up to 1 min long video with high consistency and camera control.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
[global caption] The scene features a lone explorer, [character1], discovering a hidden waterfall in a dense, green jungle. 
This scene contains 2 shots demonstrating camera movement. 
[per shot caption] The shot starts as a close-up on [character1]'s face, showing his tired but determined expression. The camera then slowly dollies out, revealing they are standing at the entrance to a cave. 
[shot cut] Starting from a medium shot of [character1] from behind, the camera slowly pans left, moving past them to reveal a spectacular hidden waterfall and a lush lagoon inside the cave.
